creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
The port ist currently marked as broken. The patch did not change something about this.

A build with poudriere stop with this error:

/usr/bin/fetch --no-verify-peer -o/dev/null "https://docs.broadcom.com/docs/1.20.15_StorCLI?eula=true"
fetch: https://docs.broadcom.com/docs/1.20.15_StorCLI?eula=true: No address record
*** Error code 1

I can fetch this manually so it could be a bug in poudriere.

Can you please have a look at this and update the patch?
